calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus
Off Calendar Jul-11-2024 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances via Zoom Conference
Jeff Lewis, Esq., MARVIN FIRESTONE, MD-JD & ASSOCIATES, LLP 650-212-4900 jeff@lawmdjd.com Attorney for Petitioner Kenneth Matsumura, M.D.
GREG W. CHAMBERS, Esq., Supervising Deputy Attorney General (415) 510-3382 Greg.Chambers@doj.ca.gov Attorneys for Respondent Medical Board of California for Defendant.
Cathy Buenaventura CSR# 8724, 650-922-3629, cathybuenaventuracsr@gmail.com Court reporter,

Hearing is held. Argued. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER KENNETH MATSUMURA , M.D.'s Motion For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus.

Petitioner Kenneth Matsumura's petition for writ of mandamus is denied.

[SEE WORD MINUTES FOR COMPLETE DETAILS]

Order is signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: W. Trupek, Court Reporter: Cathy Buenaventura CSR# 8724, 650-922-3629, cathybuenaventuracsr@gmail.com, Reported. (302/RBU)
